subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Us unto him who hath turned toward the Most Great Remembrance, when He came with His name, the Self-Subsisting, from the heaven of the will of your Lord, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الذکر الاعظم اذ اتی باسمه القیوم من سماء مشیه ربکم العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @chastisement and requital
